Global Variable# FF_FALSE

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FF_FALSE: HRESULT { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ff_false#Discussion)

The operation did not complete successfully.
